body:
```
box@9ebf65a64f8e:~$ $ --status 00fe2f7e-2313-4a18-afd9-bf37833c3e24
54c6a80f-5bd9-48b0-b719-5e7f620ab404
  uuid 54c6a80f-5bd9-48b0-b719-5e7f620ab404
  status executing
  command "solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1647 --think max --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary"
  logPath /tmp/start-command-screen-1776580293154-z0q5rv.log
  startTime "2026-04-19T06:31:33.156Z"
  workingDirectory /home/box
  shell /bin/sh
  platform linux
  options
    isolated screen
    isolationMode detached
    sessionName 00fe2f7e-2313-4a18-afd9-bf37833c3e24
    user false
    keepAlive false
    useCommandStream false
box@9ebf65a64f8e:~$ cat /tmp/start-command-screen-1776580293154-z0q5rv.log
=== Start Command Log ===
Execution ID: 54c6a80f-5bd9-48b0-b719-5e7f620ab404
Timestamp: 2026-04-19 06:31:33.154
Command: solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1647 --think max --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary
Environment: screen
Mode: detached
Session: 00fe2f7e-2313-4a18-afd9-bf37833c3e24
Platform: linux
Node Version: v24.3.0
Working Directory: /home/box
==================================================

Command started in detached screen session: 00fe2f7e-2313-4a18-afd9-bf37833c3e24
Session will exit automatically after command completes.
Reattach with: screen -r 00fe2f7e-2313-4a18-afd9-bf37833c3e24

==================================================
Finished: 2026-04-19 06:31:33.181
Exit Code: 0
box@9ebf65a64f8e:~$ 
```

Looks like log is not beign recorded in real time. That should be fixed, at all times, we need to have access to actual recording of output from the command at `logPath /tmp/start-command-screen-1776580293154-z0q5rv.log`. Even better to have path like `/tmp/start-command/logs/isolation/screen/54c6a80f-5bd9-48b0-b719-5e7f620ab404`, when uuid is specified. Also we should use `/tmp/start-command/` for all our temporary files.

So I expect that logs file to contain actual full log of `Command: solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1647 --think max --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary` at all times, while it is executing, and full log once it is executed.

That is the only way we later will be able to realiably use that log if eny problem occurs, for example for GitHub issue reporting. That should be supported for all isolation types, and for both JavaScript and Rust.

We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration.

If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
title: Log is not beign recorded in real time
